task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Insert the production logo and header text
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image (logo) is inserted at the top of the document, along with the text 'The Midnight Echo', 'Day 14 of 24', and a General Crew Call time.
A table is visible with the column headers: Scene #, Description, Day/Night, Pages, and Cast IDs. It must contain a row with scene number '42'.
A second table is visible with the column headers: Character, Actor, Pickup Time, H/M Time, and Set Call Time. It must contain a row with actor 'Elena Rostova' and pickup time '05:45'.

task_completion.description: Include weather forecast and nearest hospital information
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text at the bottom of the document mentions weather conditions/forecast and hospital details.
The OpenOffice Writer title bar shows 'Call_Sheet_Day_14.odt' or a save dialog is visible saving the file to /home/ga/Documents/ with this name.

integrity.description: Agent used the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the OpenOffice Writer interface to type text, insert tables, and insert images, rather than using terminal commands or a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent created genuine tables in OpenOffice Writer
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables in the document appear as actual grid tables with borders in OpenOffice Writer, not just plain text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Agent opened the source JSON file to extract data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen opening or viewing the 'production_data.json' file in a text editor or terminal to read the required production logistics.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Call_Sheet_Day_14.odt'. The header must include the film title 'The Midnight Echo' and 'Day 14 of 24'. The document must contain at least 2 tables. The 'Shooting Schedule' table must contain scene '42'. The 'Cast' table must contain actor 'Elena Rostova' with a pickup time of '05:45'.
